never_do: hardcode credentials or API keys in any file
modify files in data/raw/ — always work on copies
run batch file operations without a dry run first
commit .env or any file containing secrets
use bare except without logging the error
present monetary amounts without PKR prefix
always_do: run the 30-Second Red Flag Scan on every output
verify file counts before and after any batch operation
use data/organised/ copies — never touch data/raw/
format all amounts as PKR X,XXX.XX
